nasb.text: The flowers have already appeared in the land; The time has arrived for pruning the vines, And the voice of the turtledove has been heard in our land.

esv.text: The flowers appear on the earth, the time of singing has come, and the voice of the turtledove is heard in our land.

cnv.text: 地上百花齊放， 百鳥齊鳴的時候已經來到； 斑鳩的聲音在我們境內也聽見了。

ccb.text: 大地百花盛开， 百鸟争鸣的季节已经来临， 田野也传来斑鸠的叫声。
